name: My Bromance 2: 5 Years Later
original_name: พี่ชาย My Bromance 2 : 5 Years Later
overview: Five years after Golf's "death," Bank discovers he's alive, and they reunite, facing unresolved questions and a changed society with the help of their friends.

trailers.title: My Bromance 2: 5 Years Later (Official Trailer) + 2Fluke say hi to everyone in adorable clip!
Thai BL series "My Bromance 2: 5 Years Later" international exclusive premiere only on GagaOOLala!
